metadata.title: Send quote | Slashie
metadata.description: Send a clear quote for a Slashie task with price, message, and availability.

en.title: Send a quote
en.description: Share your price, timing, and why you are a good fit for this task.
en.notFoundDescription: This task may have been removed or is no longer available for quotes.

metadata.title: 傳送報價 | Slashie
metadata.description: 為 Slashie 任務傳送清晰報價，包括價錢、訊息和可提供時間。

zh_hk.title: 傳送報價
zh_hk.description: 分享你的價錢、時間，以及為何適合這個任務。
zh_hk.notFoundDescription: 此任務可能已移除，或已不再接受報價。
